rows.label: qev025201_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh, my. Did you speak to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0002
rows.name:
That must mean you're willing to listen to my story, isn't it?
I'm so grateful, so happy, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey!
Don't drag an outsider into this and make things complicated![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm telling you this for your own good.
You're better off walking away quietly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev025201_SEL0011
rows.name: Hear the Ma-non out.

rows.label: qev025201_JNK0020
rows.name: Leave

rows.label: qev025201_SEL0021
rows.name: Walk away as recommended.

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, you're a good person who values encounters, aren't you!
Surely you have the blessing of the god Ichi-go Ichi-e![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0006
rows.name:
Eh, Ichi-go Ichi-e isn't the name of a god?
It's a proverb about a once-in-a-lifetime encounter?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Earth's culture is so profound, isn't it?
But that doesn't change the fact that you're a good person for listening![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0008
rows.name: Oh, that's far too sad, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Meeting here must be some kind of fate, right?
It wouldn't hurt to just listen to my story, would it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0010
rows.name: I just want you to hear me out, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0011
rows.name:
The store owner won't let me inside, you see?
I'm a paying customer.
All I want is to buy some Earth-made clothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0012
rows.name: Look, since we're here, can I just be honest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0013
rows.name: I've always... well... been really bad with reptiles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0014
rows.name:
So I just can't! I absolutely cannot handle Ma-non!
I'm sorry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oh, that's a very sad reason, isn't it!
I don't know what kind of species reptiles are,
but I can tell it has a very bad vibe to it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0016
rows.name:
I really wish you wouldn't talk about us like that, you know?
Look, if you look closely, I have a very cute face![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0017
rows.name: Look, look, look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0018
rows.name: Ugh, don't put your face so close to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0019
rows.name: It's not just how you look, I'm worried about pathogens too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Stuff that doesn't exist on Earth...
You guys absolutely must be carrying something like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0021
rows.name:
This is just unfortunate, isn't it...
At this rate, we'll be speaking in parallel lines forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Well then...
I'll just continue standing in front of the shop like this for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0023
rows.name: That way, you'll be able to see that no diseases break out, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0024
rows.name: Plus, it will give the owner time to get used to my face, won't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Oh, if I do say so myself, this is a great idea, isn't it!
This must be the divine guidance of the god Isseki-Nicho![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0026
rows.name: Give me a break, seriously![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hey, you! You understand the whole situation now, right?
Please explain to this Ma-non that what's impossible is impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Besides, there must be other problems like this around,
so you might as well go confirm the provisional government's stance on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0029
rows.name:
If you show her an official endorsement from the government,
she might finally give up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0030
rows.name: Oh, I would actually like to request that as well, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0031
rows.name:
If the government recognizes the shopping rights of Ma-non,
I'll be able to proudly pick out clothes, won't I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0032
rows.name: Please, I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Well then, I'll be waiting here for good news
while stealing glances inside the shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hurry up and get this sorted out with the provisional government.
Otherwise I won't even be able to open the shop in peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0101
rows.name: Earthling clothes are truly fascinating, aren't they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0102
rows.name:
Please hurry and talk to the government people
so I can shop for lots and lots of clothes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0201
rows.name:
The government people really did say they wanted
to be friends with us, didn't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025201_MSG0202
rows.name:
In that case, I want Alesa to understand too
so I can shop for the wonderful clothes in her store![ST:wait ]
